name: @runecraft/spawn
description: Spawn tmux integration: automatically opens subagent panes and renders real-time agent execution with smart layouts

scripts.build: mkdir -p dist/bin dist/scripts && bun build src/index.ts --outdir dist --target node && bun build src/bin/spawn.ts --outdir dist/bin --target node --executable && bun build src/scripts/install.ts --outdir dist/scripts --target node && bun build src/scripts/update-plugins.ts --outdir dist/scripts --target node && node -e "require('fs').chmodSync('dist/bin/spawn.js', 0o755)"
scripts.postinstall: test -f dist/scripts/install.js && node dist/scripts/install.js || echo 'Skipping postinstall setup (dist not found)'

author: Arcanum
